title: WHO’s Science in 5 - The Gift of Blood: Why It Matters
description: Dr. Yuyun Maryuningsih explains how donating blood can save three lives and outlines what makes safe blood systems work.

title: National Blood Donor Month 2025 | OneBlood
description: A tribute to all blood donors and a call to make an impact during National Blood Donor Month.

title: Dear Hero, Thank You for Donating Blood.
description: A heartfelt video message thanking all blood donors for their selfless contributions.

title: Blood Donation Process: Student Guide
description: A step-by-step guide showing students how the blood donation process works and how easy it is to become a donor.

title: Blood donation myths: Busted!
description: Experts address and dispel the most common myths around blood donation.

title: How a blood donation actually helps our community
description: Discover the ripple effects and community impact of blood donation, one pint at a time.

title: Earl's Story: How Blood Donors Saved Me
description: A real recipient shares how donated blood saved his life and thanks all who give.
